rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Strike Plaintiffs Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents And For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 16, 2017 line 1. DEFENDANT STEPHEN HOM's MOTION To Strike Plaintiffs Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents And For Monetary Sanctions Continued to November 21, 2017 to be heard with other pending motion.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES FAHEY VS. SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, INC.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 16, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANT SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, INC.'s DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to clearly state each cause of action separately (CRC 2.112) and to make factual allegations in support of each element of each cause of action in clear and concise language. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL VS. TERESA ROLIZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: (1) Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Respponses To Form Interrogatories, Set Two, And Inspection Demands, Set Three, From Defendants Teresa Roliz, As Trustee Of The 61-65a Henry Irrevocable Trust, And Teresa Roliz, Individually; And (2) Request For Sanctions Against Defendants Teresa Roliz, As Trustee Of The 61-65a Henry Irrevocable Trust, And Teresa Roliz, Individually
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 16, 2017 line 3. PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion To Compel Respponses To Form Interrogatories, Set Two, And Inspection Demands, Set Three, From Defendants Teresa Roliz, As Trustee Of The 61-65a Henry Irrevocable Trust, And Teresa Roliz, Individually; And Request For Sanctions Against Defendants Teresa Roliz, As Trustee Of The 61-65a Henry Irrevocable Trust, And Teresa Roliz, Individually GRANTED. Defendant in her individual capacity and as Trustee shall provide complete verified responses to discovery within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $950. All future regularly noticed discovery motions to be filed for 9:00 a.m. in department 301. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL VS. TERESA ROLIZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: (1) Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrrogatories, Set Two, And Inspection Demand, Set Two, From Defendant Maire Dwan; And (2) Request For Sanctions Against Defendant Maire Dwan
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 16, 2017 line 3. PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrrogatories, Set Two, And Inspection Demand, Set Two, From Defendant Maire Dwan; And Request For Sanctions Against Defendant Maire Dwan GRANTED. Defendant shall provide complete verified responses without objection to discovery within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $475. All future regularly noticed discovery motions to be filed for 9:00 a.m. in department 301. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 212-214 CALIFORNIA ST., LLC VS. CBD SOLUTIONS INC. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 16, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANT CBD SOLUTIONS INC. and CSBB, INC.'s AMENDED DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Hearing Required. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TIM TAM VS. ANDREY STRAKHOV ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 16, 2017 line 5. DEFENDANT ANDREY STRAKHOV and NATALIA BERNKHARD's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to join other co-owners as Plaintiffs or to allege Plaintiff's authority to act on behalf of other co-owners in issuing the notice of termination and bringing this action. Demurrer is otherwise overruled; the issue of correct amount of rent cannot be properly addresses on a demurrer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARGHERITA LITKE VS. MICHAEL SHIFERAW ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Strike Of Defendant Michael Shiferaw To Complaint Of Plaintiff Margherita Litke; Memo Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 16, 2017 line 6. DEFENDANT MICHAEL SHIFERAW's Motion To Strike Of Defendant Michael Shiferaw To Complaint Of Plaintiff Margherita Litke DENIED. Complaint sufficiently alleges facts to support a request for statutory damages per CCP 1174(b). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARGHERITA LITKE VS. MICHAEL SHIFERAW ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 16, 2017 line 6. DEFENDANT MICHAEL SHIFERAW DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain.= (501/REQ)
